name: volaura
description: Volaura engineering skills — security review, TDD workflow, system design, product strategy, continuous learning

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: 10-point security checklist for FastAPI endpoints, RLS policies, auth flows, and input validation. P0-P3 severity scale.

skills.name: tdd-workflow
skills.description: Red→Green→Refactor workflow for FastAPI+pytest. Write failing test first, then implement. Covers async tests, Supabase mocking, fixture patterns.

skills.name: continuous-learning
skills.description: Session-end pattern extraction protocol. Extract mistakes, patterns, and decisions to memory files before closing session.

skills.name: product-strategy
skills.description: Product strategy evaluation — feature prioritization, competitive positioning, KPIs, user personas, product-market fit analysis.
